pages.title: Baskets
pages.text: Your first &6basket&r - the settlement's earliest storage! It holds &e9&r stacks; &b{key:key.use}&r to open it. Whatever sits in the first slot is displayed on top of the basket, so you can tell your stores apart at a glance.

pages.title: The common stores
pages.text: Baskets placed on your settlement's &6claimed land&r join the shared &2storage pool&r. Citizens fetch tools, materials, and food from them while they work - what one gathers, all may draw upon.

pages.title: Moving a basket
pages.text:
&b{key:key.sneak} + {key:key.use}&r with an &eempty hand&r scoops the whole basket up - contents and all - as a single item you can carry and place elsewhere.

Breaking it normally instead spills everything onto the ground!
